name: nginx-multisite
description: Provisions an Nginx web server with three SSL-enabled virtual hosts, self-signed TLS certificate generation, HTTP→HTTPS redirect, security hardening (UFW firewall, Fail2Ban, sysctl, SSH hardening), and attribute-driven site configuration via a multi-recipe structure.

name: cache
description: Provisions a dual caching layer with Memcached (default configuration) and Redis (password-authenticated, port 6379), including a ruby_block workaround to strip deprecated Redis configuration directives that cause startup failures.

name: fastapi-tutorial
description: Deploys a full-stack Python FastAPI application by installing system dependencies, cloning the app from GitHub, creating a Python virtual environment, provisioning a PostgreSQL database and user, generating a .env file with credentials, and registering a systemd service for the uvicorn application server.
